languages.text: {n}Ваш вопль тонет в шуме ветра и дождя. Паск и его рабочие наводят пушки на отряд Альвы-9 — и на вас.{/n}
{n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваш вопль тонет в шуме ветра и дождя. Паск и его рабочие наводят пушки на отряд Альвы-9 — и на вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}
{n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}
{n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの叫びは風と雨の音に消えてしまう。パスクと彼の仲間たちはアルバ-9とあなたを銃で狙っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: あなたの叫びは風と雨の音に消えてしまう。パスクと彼の仲間たちはアルバ-9とあなたを銃で狙っている。

languages.text: {n}El ruido de la lluvia y el viento ahoga tu grito. Pask y sus trabajadores apuntan con sus armas en dirección a Alva-9... y a ti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El ruido de la lluvia y el viento ahoga tu grito. Pask y sus trabajadores apuntan con sus armas en dirección a Alva-9... y a ti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的呼喊被风雨淹没。帕斯克和他的工人们将武器对准了阿尔瓦-9——还有你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的呼喊被风雨淹没。帕斯克和他的工人们将武器对准了阿尔瓦-9——还有你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Stimme wird vom Wind und dem Regen übertönt. Pask und seine Arbeiter richten ihre Waffen auf Alva-9 ... und dich.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Stimme wird vom Wind und dem Regen übertönt. Pask und seine Arbeiter richten ihre Waffen auf Alva-9 ... und dich.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Haykırışın, rüzgâr ve yağmur sesiyle bastırılıyor. Pask ve işçileri, silahlarını Alva-9'a ve sana doğrultuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Haykırışın, rüzgâr ve yağmur sesiyle bastırılıyor. Pask ve işçileri, silahlarını Alva-9'a ve sana doğrultuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre cri est couvert par le bruit du vent et de la pluie. Pask et ses hommes pointent leurs armes sur Alva-9… et sur vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your cry is drowned out by the sound of the wind and rain. Pask and his workers are pointing their weapons at Alva-9 — and you.{/n}
